goal: Design comprehensive validation and test coverage plan for artifact tree integrity verification based on discovery findings.

planningDecision.rationale: Discovery phase validated all architectural components and mechanisms are in place. Test plan decomposes validation requirements into implementable test cases covering all critical paths. Ready to execute comprehensive validation suite.

testCases.title: Propagation artifact emission and persistence - Happy path
testCases.description: Verify that PropagationExecutionService emits PropagationEvent, ArtifactEventListener processes it, and artifacts are persisted to database
steps: Create propagation execution context
Execute PropagationExecutionService.execute()
Verify PropagationEvent is emitted to EventBus
Verify ArtifactEventListener.onEvent(PropagationEvent) is triggered
Verify artifacts are queued for tree insertion
Verify SaveGraphEventToGraphRepositoryListener persists to database
Query GraphRepository to confirm artifact persistence
testCases.expectedOutcome: PropagationEvent emitted → ArtifactEventListener processes → Artifacts persisted to GraphRepository
validationPoints: ArtifactEntity records created with correct parentKey

testCases.title: Propagation with null output handling
testCases.description: Verify that null propagation output is converted to failedOutput and persisted with error tracking
steps: Execute PropagationExecutionService with null-returning propagator
Verify failedOutput is created with error message
Verify PropagationRecordEntity is saved with FAILED status
Verify PropagationEvent is still emitted
Verify error details are persisted
testCases.expectedOutcome: Null output → failedOutput conversion → Error tracked in database

testCases.title: Multiple propagators with correlation key deduplication
testCases.description: Verify that multiple propagators with same correlationKey are deduplicated correctly
steps: Execute multiple propagators with same correlationKey
Verify all propagation records are created
Verify duplicates are identified via correlationKey
Verify deduplication logic prevents duplicate tree entries
testCases.expectedOutcome: Multiple records with same correlationKey → Deduplication applied → Single logical propagation in tree
validationPoints: No redundant artifacts in final tree

testCases.title: Filter artifact emission verification
testCases.description: Verify that FilterExecutionService properly emits filter artifacts and event listener processes them
steps: Execute FilterExecutionService.executeFilters()
Verify FilterDecisionRecordEntity is saved
Verify filter artifacts are queued for tree insertion
Verify ArtifactEventListener processes filter events
Verify artifacts are persisted to database
testCases.expectedOutcome: Filter execution → Decision persisted → Artifacts emitted and persisted
validationPoints: FilterDecisionRecordEntity saved with correct filter state
Filter artifacts added to artifact tree
No events lost in event stream

testCases.title: Filter decision artifact parenting
testCases.description: Verify that filter decision artifacts maintain proper parent-child relationships
steps: Execute filter within propagation/transformation context
Verify filter artifacts reference correct parent
Verify tree structure maintains hierarchical relationships
Query artifact tree to confirm parenting
testCases.expectedOutcome: Filter artifacts properly parented to execution context
validationPoints: Tree hierarchy validated via depth property

testCases.title: Transformer artifact parent-child relationship establishment
testCases.description: Verify that TransformerExecutionService establishes correct parent-child relationships for transformed artifacts
preconditions: Transformer configured to create child artifacts
steps: Create parent artifact in tree
Execute TransformerExecutionService.transform()
Verify child artifacts are created with parent reference
Verify TransformationRecordEntity is saved
Verify TransformationEvent is emitted
Verify tree structure reflects parent-child relationship
testCases.expectedOutcome: Transformer execution → Child artifacts created → Parent reference established → Event emitted

testCases.title: Transformer with null output handling and parent preservation
testCases.description: Verify that null transformer output preserves parent context and creates failedOutput artifact
steps: Execute TransformerExecutionService with null-returning transformer
Verify failedOutput artifact is created
Verify failedOutput maintains parent reference
Verify TransformationRecordEntity is saved with FAILED status
Verify tree structure is consistent
testCases.expectedOutcome: Null output → failedOutput artifact → Parent preserved → Error tracked

testCases.title: Multi-level transformer chain with cascading parent references
testCases.description: Verify that chained transformers maintain correct parent-child relationships across multiple levels
steps: Execute first transformer (creates L1 children)
Execute second transformer on L1 outputs (creates L2 children)
Execute third transformer on L2 outputs (creates L3 children)
Verify each level maintains correct parent references
Verify tree depth matches transformer chain depth
testCases.expectedOutcome: Transformer chain → Multi-level hierarchy → All parent references correct
validationPoints: L1 artifacts have root as parent
L2 artifacts have L1 as parent
L3 artifacts have L2 as parent
Artifact depth: root(0) → L1(1) → L2(2) → L3(3)

testCases.title: Null output conversion to failedOutput
testCases.description: Verify that null outputs are converted to failedOutput with appropriate error messages
preconditions: Service configured to handle null returns
steps: Configure execution to return null
Execute service method
Verify null is caught before returning
Verify failedOutput is created
Verify error message contains relevant context
testCases.expectedOutcome: Null output → Caught → failedOutput created → Error message populated
validationPoints: failedOutput type is ERROR or FAILED
Stack trace or error context preserved

testCases.title: Null output logging and audit trail
testCases.description: Verify that null outputs are logged explicitly with audit trail for debugging
steps: Execute with null-returning operation
Verify explicit null output logging occurs
Verify log level is appropriate (WARN or ERROR)
Verify log includes execution context (executionKey, layerIndex, etc.)
Verify audit trail shows null handling event
testCases.expectedOutcome: Null output → Explicit log entry → Audit trail entry created
validationPoints: Context information in log (executionKey, stage, propagator/transformer name)

testCases.title: Null output with artifact tree impact assessment
testCases.description: Verify that null outputs don't corrupt artifact tree structure
preconditions: Null output scenario in middle of execution
steps: Build partial artifact tree
Execute operation returning null in middle of sequence
Verify failedOutput artifact is added to tree
Verify subsequent operations continue correctly
Verify tree structure remains valid (no orphans, proper parenting)
testCases.expectedOutcome: Null output in sequence → Tree remains consistent → Execution continues
validationPoints: Final tree is traversable and queryable

testCases.title: Orphan artifact detection and buffering
testCases.description: Verify that artifacts without parents are detected and buffered until parents exist
steps: Insert artifact with non-existent parent
Verify addArtifactResult() returns PARENT_NOT_FOUND
Verify artifact is buffered (not discarded)
Verify artifact is logged for later linking
Verify orphan buffer state is accessible
testCases.expectedOutcome: Artifact without parent → PARENT_NOT_FOUND status → Artifact buffered
validationPoints: Buffer size increases on orphan detection
Artifact metadata preserved for later linking

testCases.title: Orphan artifact linking when parent appears
testCases.description: Verify that buffered orphan artifacts are linked when parent is subsequently added
preconditions: Orphan artifacts buffered from previous operations
Parent artifact about to be inserted
steps: Verify orphan buffer contains artifacts waiting for parent
Insert parent artifact
Verify addArtifactResult() triggers orphan link resolution
Verify buffered orphans are now linked to parent
Verify orphan buffer is cleaned up
testCases.expectedOutcome: Parent inserted → Orphan buffer checked → Orphans linked → Buffer cleared
validationPoints: All orphans with matching parent key are linked

testCases.title: Orphan artifact eventual persistence despite late parent arrival
testCases.description: Verify that orphaned artifacts that were buffered are persisted correctly when parent finally arrives
preconditions: Orphan artifacts buffered from early stages
Parent artifact added at late stage
steps: Create scenario with out-of-order artifact insertion
Verify orphans are buffered correctly
Add parent artifact out of natural order
Trigger tree persistence
Query database to verify orphan artifacts are persisted with correct parent
testCases.expectedOutcome: Orphan artifacts persisted with correct parent despite insertion order
validationPoints: ArtifactEntity records exist for all artifacts
Artifact keys and parent keys match correctly

testCases.title: Intermediate artifact creation for missing parent paths
testCases.description: Verify that intermediate artifacts are automatically created when parent path is incomplete
steps: Insert artifact with path ak:root/stage/propagator/999/artifact (missing levels between root and stage)
Verify intermediate artifacts are auto-created
Verify intermediate artifacts have INTERMEDIATE_ARTIFACT type
Verify final artifact is parented correctly
Verify tree structure is complete
testCases.expectedOutcome: Missing path levels → Intermediate artifacts auto-created → Tree made complete
validationPoints: Final artifact properly parented to intermediate

testCases.title: Content hash deduplication for identical artifacts
testCases.description: Verify that artifacts with identical content are deduplicated via content hash
preconditions: Two artifacts with identical content but different keys
steps: Create artifact A with content X
Insert artifact A into tree
Create artifact B with identical content X but different key
Insert artifact B into tree
Verify addArtifactResult() returns DUPLICATE_HASH
Verify artifact B is not duplicated in tree
testCases.expectedOutcome: Identical content → Same content hash → DUPLICATE_HASH → Single artifact stored

testCases.title: Database deduplication with ArtifactDbRef
testCases.description: Verify that database storage uses references (ArtifactDbRef) instead of duplicating content
preconditions: Multiple artifacts with same content hash
steps: Create multiple artifacts with identical content
Call ArtifactService.doPersist(executionKey, root)
Verify first artifact is stored as full ArtifactEntity
Verify duplicate artifacts are stored as ArtifactDbRef references
Query database to confirm no content duplication
testCases.expectedOutcome: Multiple artifacts with same content → First stored as entity → Duplicates as references
validationPoints: Database stores single ArtifactEntity for content

testCases.title: Deduplication at scale with large artifact sets
testCases.description: Verify that deduplication remains efficient with large numbers of artifacts
steps: Execute workflow generating 1000+ artifacts
Verify deduplication correctly identifies duplicates
Measure database storage before and after deduplication
Verify performance is acceptable
Verify no deduplication logic errors under load
testCases.expectedOutcome: Large artifact sets deduplicated efficiently with minimal performance impact

components: ArtifactTreeBuilder.addArtifactResult() - Verify orphan buffering and deduplication logic
PropagationExecutionService.execute() - Verify event emission and null output handling
level1_UnitTests.validationMethod: Mock EventBus/Repositories, assert method returns and state changes

interactions: ArtifactEventListener → ArtifactTreeBuilder → ArtifactService (tree building and persistence)
level2_IntegrationTests.validationMethod: Use real/in-memory EventBus and Repository mocks, verify event flow and artifact creation

scenarios: Complete propagation → transformation → filter execution with full tree building and persistence
Out-of-order artifact insertion with orphan buffering and late parent resolution
Null output handling at various stages with error tracking
Large-scale execution with deduplication at scale
Multi-layer transformer chains with cascading artifacts
level3_EndToEndTests.validationMethod: Use test execution context with real or test repositories, verify final tree structure and database state

queryChecks: SELECT * FROM artifact WHERE parentKey IS NULL AND type != 'ROOT' → Should be empty (no orphans in database)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM artifact WHERE contentHash = X GROUP BY contentHash → Should show deduplication (multiple artifacts per hash)
SELECT parentKey FROM artifact WHERE artifactKey = Y → Should match expected parent
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM propagation_record WHERE correlationKey = Z → Should show correct correlation tracking
SELECT * FROM artifact WHERE executionKey = K ORDER BY depth → Should show correct hierarchy
level4_DatabaseValidation.validationMethod: Run queries after test execution, assert expected row counts and relationships

implementationSteps.title: Create test infrastructure and test base classes
implementationSteps.description: Set up test utilities, base classes, and fixtures for artifact tree testing
tasks: Create ArtifactTreeTestBase with artifact creation helper methods
Create EventBusTestSpy to capture and verify events
Create RepositoryTestMocks for GraphRepository, PropagationRepository, etc.
Create test data builders for ArtifactEntity, PropagationRecordEntity, etc.
Create database assertion utilities for verification queries

implementationSteps.title: Implement unit tests for ArtifactNode and ArtifactTreeBuilder
implementationSteps.description: Verify core artifact tree structure behavior
tasks: Test ArtifactNode.addArtifact() with ADDED/DUPLICATE_KEY/DUPLICATE_HASH/PARENT_NOT_FOUND scenarios
Test orphan buffering and linking logic in ArtifactTreeBuilder
Test deduplication with content hash collisions
Test intermediate artifact creation for missing parent paths

implementationSteps.title: Implement unit tests for execution services (null output handling)
implementationSteps.description: Verify null output handling in PropagationExecutionService and TransformerExecutionService
tasks: Test null output conversion to failedOutput
Test null output logging and error tracking
Test failedOutput artifact creation with parent preservation
Test event emission with null outputs

implementationSteps.title: Implement integration tests for propagation artifact emission
implementationSteps.description: Verify full propagation → event emission → artifact listener → persistence flow
tasks: Test PropagationExecutionService.execute() event emission
Test ArtifactEventListener processing of PropagationEvent
Test artifact queuing and tree insertion
Test SaveGraphEventToGraphRepositoryListener persistence
Test database queries verify artifacts persisted correctly

implementationSteps.title: Implement integration tests for transformer parent-child relationships
implementationSteps.description: Verify transformer execution establishes correct parent-child relationships
tasks: Test TransformerExecutionService.transform() parent reference establishment
Test multi-level transformer chains with cascading artifacts
Test null output handling in transformers with parent preservation
Test tree depth and hierarchy correctness
Verify database persists all parent-child relationships correctly

implementationSteps.title: Implement integration tests for filter artifact emission
implementationSteps.description: Verify filter execution properly emits and persists filter artifacts
tasks: Test FilterExecutionService.executeFilters() artifact emission
Test FilterDecisionRecordEntity persistence
Test filter artifact parenting to execution context
Test ArtifactEventListener processes filter artifacts
Verify database contains all filter decision artifacts

implementationSteps.title: Implement end-to-end workflow tests
implementationSteps.description: Test complete propagation → transformation → filter execution with tree building and persistence
tasks: Test complete workflow with propagators, transformers, and filters
Test out-of-order artifact insertion with orphan buffering and late parent resolution
Test null outputs at various execution stages
Test large-scale execution (100+ artifacts) with deduplication
Verify final tree structure and database state correctness

implementationSteps.title: Implement database validation queries
implementationSteps.description: Create and execute database validation queries to verify persistence layer
tasks: Query for orphaned artifacts (parentKey IS NULL for non-root)
Query to verify deduplication (contentHash grouping)
Query to verify parent-child relationships
Query to verify propagation correlation tracking
Query to verify artifact hierarchy depth
Assert all queries return expected results

implementationSteps.title: Execute all test cases and generate test coverage report
implementationSteps.description: Run all tests and generate coverage metrics
tasks: Run all unit tests with coverage reporting
Run all integration tests with coverage reporting
Run end-to-end tests with coverage reporting
Generate code coverage report for artifact tree components
Verify coverage meets acceptance criteria (target: >85% for core components)
Generate test execution summary report

implementationSteps.title: Performance and load testing
implementationSteps.description: Verify deduplication and tree operations at scale
tasks: Create performance test with 1000+ artifacts
Measure tree building performance
Measure deduplication performance
Measure persistence performance
Verify no performance degradation with scale
Generate performance report with metrics

implementationSteps.title: Documentation and sign-off
implementationSteps.description: Document test results, coverage, and validation outcomes
tasks: Document test plan execution results
Document coverage metrics and gaps (if any)
Document performance metrics
Create validation sign-off report
Update artifact tree architecture documentation with validation results

highRiskAreas.area: Orphan artifact handling under high concurrency
highRiskAreas.risk: Race conditions in orphan buffering and parent linking
highRiskAreas.mitigation: Implement thread-safety tests with concurrent artifact insertion

highRiskAreas.risk: ArtifactDbRef references may become invalid if referenced artifact deleted
highRiskAreas.mitigation: Implement referential integrity tests and cascade behavior validation

highRiskAreas.risk: Tree operations may degrade with thousands of artifacts
highRiskAreas.mitigation: Load testing with 1000+ artifacts and performance profiling

successCriteria: All unit tests pass (target: 95% success rate)
All integration tests pass (target: 100% success rate)
All end-to-end tests pass (target: 100% success rate)
Code coverage meets targets (overall 85%, critical paths 90%+)
No orphaned artifacts in test database
Performance metrics within acceptable range (<5s for tree building of 1000 artifacts)
All parent-child relationships verified correct in database
phaseActivities: Implement all test cases per implementation steps
Execute tests and generate coverage reports
Document results and create validation sign-off report
